coverage_note: The bundled DPYD population database stores gene-level and marker-level interpretation notes, but does not embed a full ancestry-frequency matrix for these markers yet.
gene_population_patterns_intro: Broader population patterns curated from DPYD pyrimidine catabolism, 5-fluorouracil/capecitabine clearance, toxicity susceptibility, and pharmacogenomic dosing biology and condition-association literature.

sources.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000188641: DPYD coordinate source

gene_population_patterns.summary: DPYD findings should be read against pyrimidine catabolism, 5-fluorouracil/capecitabine clearance, toxicity susceptibility, and pharmacogenomic dosing biology; population frequency, ascertainment, and phenotype definition can change the apparent effect size.
rs3918290 (DPYD*2A) is curated as a DPYD marker for DPYD fluoropyrimidine toxicity context, Pyrimidine catabolism; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
rs67376798 (DPYD D949V) is curated as a DPYD marker for DPYD fluoropyrimidine toxicity context, Pyrimidine catabolism; interpret ancestry and cohort patterns before assigning biological direction.
